recent.text: Dematting Creme This works great with dematting comb. I have a labradoodle, he is prone to mats. This stuff is fantastic.
Didn't work on my poodle. Not that effective at unmatting fur.
Quality product that lasts and comfortable to use for both pet and owner. I show Collies and Shi-tzu's, both are challenging dogs to groom. We REALLY love this brush!
Works Well for Tangled Dog Hair. This detangling treatment works really well on my dog's long, curly coat. It helps loosen knots and makes brushing much easier.
No better than others groomer. Does not get thru tangles. Im going to return it
Works. Works well in my small dog, will buy again
it is like glue. This is the ABSOLUTE WORST stuff I have ever used. I put it on my pup's small mat (tangle) it is like glue. I could not hope to brush it out after. I had to cut his fur!
Amazing. Amazing product, works like a charm
Detangled minor matting. For the minor matting that occurs on my doodle's body, this works great. I like that it is a leave-in detangler.
Would Not Recommend. Didn't really work for me
Best for smaller dogs. It's good when used with the right comb. However, I lost patience and ended up shaving my dog's hair.
I let it sit on the mat longer. Made cutting the fur easier. Worked as stated
Just need patience. Product really works.
Would buy again if needed. I used this in my doggy and it worked well he was very matted.
